tools.name: query_used_cars_data
tools.description: Executes a SQL SELECT query on the used cars dataset stored in Supabase. Use this tool for retrieving raw or aggregated data directly from the database.

sql_query.description: A valid SQL SELECT query targeting the used_cars table

constraints: Do NOT use INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, or DROP
Limit results to a maximum of 100 rows unless using aggregation
Only use valid columns: car_name, year, selling_price, present_price, kms_driven, fuel_type, transmission, seller_type, owner
notes: Prefer aggregation queries when answering analytical questions

tools.name: aggregate_used_car_data
tools.description: Performs aggregation operations such as average, minimum, maximum, and count on the dataset. Use this for analytical queries instead of writing raw SQL.
constraints: Group_by must be a valid categorical column
Filters must match valid column names
notes: Use this tool instead of raw SQL when possible

tools.name: search_web
tools.description: Searches the internet for external information such as market trends, pricing factors, and general explanations. Use ONLY when the question cannot be answered from the dataset.

query.description: Search query describing the information needed

constraints: Use ONLY for external knowledge or explanations
Do NOT use for questions that can be answered using the dataset
Prefer database tools when data is available internally
Do not make assumptions without evidence from results
notes: Useful for 'why' questions and industry insights
Can be used after database queries to enrich explanations
